design_plan: Cinematic editorial blog with a bold hero, bento-style news grid using CSS Grid auto-placement with dense flow, Outfit + Cabinet Grotesk typography, subtle GSAP scroll motion guarded for no-CDN environments, and clear CTA contrast. Focus on readability, evidence-backed analysis, and conversion to Super.
headline: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

site_brief.audience: buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents
site_brief.goal: Create a frequently refreshed editorial blog homepage with a lead analysis, short posts, source cards, and a clear Super perspective on why computer-use caching makes repeated agent work cheaper and better.
site_brief.title: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

summary: A daily editorial brief for buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents, computer-use assistants, and the platforms shaping this market. Grounded in current reporting, with a clear Super perspective on why computer-use caching changes the economics of repeated workflows.
